title: REQUESTING THE HAWAII CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM OVERSIGHT COMMISSION TO ESTABLISH AN ADVISORY COMMITTEE TO DEVELOP RECOMMENDATIONS ON THE IMPLEMENTATION OF ALTERNATIVE MODELS FOR REHABILITATION AND RESTORATIVE JUSTICE ON OʻAHU.
subject: Advisory Committee
Alternative Models
Hawaii Correctional System Oversight Commission
Native Hawaiian Practitioners
Rehabilitation
Report
Restorative Justice

actions.description: Certified copies of resolutions sent, 05-12-26.
Resolution adopted in final form.
Received from House (Hse. Com. No. 829).
Transmitted to Senate.
Adopted with none voting aye with reservations; Representative(s) Garcia, Pierick voting no (2) and  Representative(s) Kapela excused (1).
Reported from JHA (Stand. Com. Rep. No. 2252-26), recommending adoption.

The committee on JHA recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 8 Ayes: Representative(s) Tarnas, Poepoe, Belatti, Hashem, Kahaloa, Takayama, Cochran, Shimizu; Ayes with reservations: none; 1 Noes: Representative(s) Garcia; and 1 Excused: Representative(s) Sayama.
Resolution scheduled to be heard by JHA on Wednesday, 04-22-26 3:00PM in conference room 430 VIA VIDEOCONFERENCE.
Report adopted; referred to the committee(s) on JHA with Representative(s) Garcia voting aye with reservations; none voting no (0) and Representative(s) Amato excused (1).
Reported from PBS (Stand. Com. Rep. No. 2174-26), recommending referral to JHA.

The committee on PBS recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 8 Ayes: Representative(s) Belatti, Iwamoto, Hashem, Ichiyama, Morikawa, Poepoe, Shimizu, Souza; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 1 Excused: Representative(s) Woodson.
Resolution scheduled to be heard by PBS on Wednesday, 04-15-26 10:30AM in conference room 411 VIA VIDEOCONFERENCE.
Referred to PBS, JHA, referral sheet 27
Received from Senate (Sen. Com. No. 417) in amended form (SD 1).
Report and Resolution Adopted, as amended (SD 1).  Transmitted to House.
One Day Notice 04-07-26.
Reported from PSM/HWN (Stand. Com. Rep. No. 3428) with recommendation of adoption, as amended (SD 1).

The committee(s) on  HWN recommend(s) that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS.  The votes in HWN were as follows: 4 Aye(s): Senator(s) Richards, Lamosao, Keohokalole, DeCorte; Aye(s) with reservations: none ; 0 No(es): none; and 1 Excused: Senator(s) Ihara.
The committee(s) on HWN deferred the measure until 04-02-26 1:00PM; Conference Room 224 & Videoconference.

The committee(s) on  PSM recommend(s) that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS.  The votes in PSM were as follows: 3 Aye(s): Senator(s) Fukunaga, Lee, C., Inouye; Aye(s) with reservations: none ; 0 No(es): none; and 2 Excused: Senator(s) Hashimoto, DeCorte.
The committee(s) on PSM/HWN has scheduled a public hearing on 03-30-26 3:00PM; Conference Room 016 & Videoconference.
Referred to PSM/HWN.
Offered.
